sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in his right middle finger for four days following a motor vehicle accident. He also reports significant pain at the end of his right middle finger. He states he was angry and flipped someone the bird during the incident.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals tenderness over the distal phalanx of the right middle finger. X-ray confirms a distal phalanx fracture of the middle finger.
medical_concepts: distal phalanx of the right middle finger
distal phalanx fracture of the middle finger

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a distal phalanx fracture of the middle finger secondary to a motor vehicle accident.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Rescribe a finger splint and follow-up in two weeks for a repeat x-ray. Start tramadol 50 mg every six hours as needed for pain for two days. Continue digoxin for atrial fibrillation.

medical_concepts: distal phalanx of the right middle finger
distal phalanx fracture of the middle finger
